Let me start with the backend and core frontend configuration files. [TOOL_CALL] write_file({"content":"from fastapi import FastAPI, UploadFile, File, HTTPException from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware from fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles from pydantic import BaseModel, EmailStr from pathlib import Path import shutil import uuid import os app = FastAPI(title="NexusAI API", description="Backend API for NexusAI Landing Page") # CORS configuration app.add_middleware( CORSMiddleware, allow_origins=["http://localhost:5173", "http://localhost:3000", "http://127.0.0.1:5173"], allow_credentials=True, allow_methods=["*"], allow_headers=["*"], ) # Ensure uploads directory exists UPLOADS_DIR = Path("uploads") UPLOADS_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True) # Serve uploads directory as static files app.mount("/uploads", StaticFiles(directory="uploads"), name="uploads") # ─── Models ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── class ContactForm(BaseModel): name: str email: EmailStr company: str = "" message: str class UploadedImage(BaseModel): filename: str url: str # ─── Contact Form Endpoint ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── @app.post("/api/contact") async def submit_contact(form: ContactForm): """Handle contact form submissions.""" # In production, you'd send an email or save to a database print(f"Contact form submission: {form.name} ({form.email}) - {form.message}") return { "success": True, "message": f"Thank you, {form.name}! We'll get back to you shortly." } # ─── Image Upload Endpoints ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── @app.post("/api/upload") async def upload_image(file: UploadFile = File(...)): """Upload an image to the uploads folder.""" allowed_types = ["image/jpeg", "image/png", "image/gif", "image/webp", "image/svg+xml"] if file.content_type not in allowed_types: raise HTTPException( status_code=400, detail=f"File type {file.content_type} not allowed. Use JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, or SVG." ) # Generate unique filename to avoid collisions ext = Path(file.filename).suffix if file.filename else ".png" unique_filename = f"{uuid.uuid4().hex}{ext}" file_path = UPLOADS_DIR / unique_filename with open(file_path, "wb") as buffer: shutil.copyfileobj(file.file, buffer) return { "success": True, "filename": unique_filename, "url": f"/uploads/{unique_filename}" } @app.get("/api/uploads") async def list_uploads(): """List all uploaded images.""" files = [] for f in UPLOADS_DIR.iterdir(): if f.is_file() and f.name != ".gitkeep": files.append({ "filename": f.name, "url": f"/uploads/{f.name}" }) return {"images": files} @app.delete("/api/upload/{filename}") async def delete_upload(filename: str): """Delete an uploaded image.""" file_path = UPLOADS_DIR / filename if not file_path.exists(): raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="File not found") file_path.unlink() return {"success": True, "message": f"Deleted {filename}"} # ─── Health Check ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── @app.get("/api/health") async def health_check(): return {"status": "healthy", "service": "NexusAI API"} ","path":"backend/main.py"})
